prompt:
A shallow tray of hydroponic grow media (clay pebbles and/or inert stones) being thoroughly rinsed under a gentle stream of clean water, with runoff flowing into a catch basin. Salt residue is visibly washed away as faint white haze in the water, and a mesh strainer and clean bucket sit nearby to communicate “flush before recharging nutrients” without relying on any text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future clean-workshop hydroponics aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic water droplets and refraction, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the subject centered and clearly about rinsing/clearing the root-zone media.
